Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore in the pebble-loghash directory.

# Purpose
The `.gitignore` file specifies files and directories that Git should ignore in a repository. It includes patterns for Python bytecode files (`*.pyc`), environment files (`.env`), macOS system files (`.DS_Store`), build directories (`dist`), manifest files (`MANIFEST`), Python cache directories (`__pycache__`), and general cache directories (`.cache`). This helps to prevent unnecessary files from being tracked in version control.
